Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 2, 035 [Šumma Alu 120][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

* dAMAR.UTU ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu zi-ir  ; dEN.LIL₂ KUR.KUR ana ḪULtu₄ uš-ta-di

(o 1) (If) Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil, is twisted round: Enlil has evilly caused the lands to be abandoned.

o 22

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu ana ZA₃-šu₂ zi-ir kurURIki DINGIR-MEŠ-šu₂ i-gam-mi-lu-šu₂

(o 2) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) is twisted round to his right: the gods of Akkad will spare it (the land).

o 33

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu ana GUB₃-šu₂ zi-ir kurELAM.MAki DINGIR-MEŠ-ša₂ KI.MIN<(i-gam-mi-lu-šu₂)>

(o 3) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) is twisted round to his left: the gods of Elam ditto (will spare it).

o 44

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu ana IGI-šu₂ ki-di-ir kurSU.BIR₄ki DINGIR-MEŠ-ša₂ KI.MIN<(i-gam-mi-lu-šu₂)>

(o 4) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) rears forwards: the gods of Subartu ditto (will spare it).

o 55

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu ana EGIR-šu₂ ki-di-ir KUR LUGAL MAR.TUki DINGIR-MEŠ-ša₂ KI.MIN<(i-gam-mi-lu-šu₂)>

(o 5) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) rears backwards: the gods of the Amorite king's land ditto (will spare it).

o 66

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu SAG-MEŠ-šu₂ ša-qa-a dEN.LIL₂ SAG KUR.KUR u₂-šaq-qa

(o 6) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his head is held high: Enlil will support the lands.

o 77

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ kat₂-mu UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ

(o 7) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face is covered: there will be an epidemic in the land.

o 88

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ GE₆ AN.GE₆ GAL₂-ma dER₃.RA KUR GU₇

(o 8) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face is black: there will be an eclipse and Erra will devour the land.

o 99

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ BABBAR SU.GU₇ dan-nu KUR DAB-ma LUGAL u₄-mi-šu i-ṣu

(o 9) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face is white: a severe famine will seize the land; the king's days (will be) few.

o 1010

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ SIG₇ dEN.LIL₂ KUR.KUR ina BAD₅.BAD₅ u₂-šam-qat

(o 10) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face (is) green: Ellil will make the lands fall in defeat.

o 1111

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ SA₅ dEN.LIL₂ ana KUR BI meš-ra-a u₂-šam-ṭa

(o 11) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face (is) red: Ellil will lessen the riches for that land.

o 1212

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ nam-ru dEN.LIL₂ KUR BI u₂-nam-mar KUR BI i-šar₂-ru₃

(o 12) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face (is) bright: Ellil will lighten that land; that land will become rich.

o 1313

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ i-na a-ša-bi-šu IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ uš-ḫa-ra-ar DINGIR-MEŠ KUR BI ana KUR₂-ša₂ i-šar-ra-ku

(o 13) (If) ditto (Marduk, while dwelling in Esaggil,) his face becomes deathly still: the gods will give that land to its enemy.

o 1414

* dAMAR.UTU ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ KA-šu₂ pe-ti  ; dEN.LIL₂ ez-zi-iš UGU KUR GU₃si

(o 14) (If) Marduk, when going out of Esaggil at the beginning of the year, his mouth (is) open: Ellil will shout furiously over the land.

o 1515

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ḫa-mu-uṭ dEN.LIL₂ SAG KUR BI i-na-aš₂-ši

(o 15) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is hasty: Ellil will take care of land.

o 1616

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ la ḫa-mu-uṭ DINGIR-MEŠ KUR BI u₂-šam-ṭu₂-u₂

(o 16) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is not hasty: the gods will disregard that land.

o 1717

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ e-šir₃ LUGAL KUR LIBIRra ša₂! KUR zu-un-nu-šu₂ sad-ru

(o 17) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is well: the king of the land will live long; rains for the land will be regular.

o 1818

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ ṣu₂-un-du-ra dEN.LIL₂ KUR BI ina ki-mil-ti uš-ta-di

(o 18) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his eyes are squinting: Ellil will wrathfully abandon that land.

o 1919

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ ar₂-ma UN-MEŠ KUR in-na-aš₂-ša₂-ra

(o 19) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his eyes are covered: the people of the land will be badly reduced.

o 2020

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ kat₂-mu KUR.KUR ḪUL-MEŠ LUGAL-MEŠ git-mu-lu!(UL-)tu₂! DU₃-MEŠ

(o 20) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his face is covered: lands will be plundered; kings will act perfectly.

o 2121

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ GE₆ SU.GU₇ KUR.KUR DABbat

(o 21) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his face is black: a famine will seize the lands.

o 2222

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ BABBAR NAM.UŠ₂-MEŠ UN-MEŠ TUR-MEŠ

(o 22) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his face is white: an epidemic will reduce the people.

o 2323

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ SIG₇ dEN.LIL₂ BAD₅.BAD₅ UN-MEŠ GARan

(o 23) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his face is green: Ellil will bring about the people's defeat.

o 2424

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ SA₅ UN-MEŠ KUR i-ri-iš-ša₂

(o 24) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his face is red: the people of the land will rejoice.

o 2525

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ nam-ru dEN.LIL₂ KUR BI EN ul-la u₂-nam-mar

(o 25) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his face is bright: Ellil will lighten the land forever.

Reverse
r 1r 1

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ zi-ir na-bal-kat₂-tu₄ KUR GARan

(r 1) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is twisted round: an uprising of the land will take place.

r 22

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ana ZA₃-šu₂ zi-ir kurURIki kit-mu-lat

(r 2) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is twisted round to his right: the land of Akkad will be angry.

r 33

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ana GUB₃-<šu₂> zi-ir kurELAM.MAki kit-mu-lat

(r 3) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is twisted round to his left: the land of Elam will be angry.

r 44

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ana ZA₃-šu₂ ki-di-ir SUḪUŠ kurURIki GI.NA

(r 4) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), rears on his right: the foundations of Akkad will be firm.

r 55

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ana GUB₃-šu₂ ki-di-ir SUḪUŠ kurELAM.MAki GI.NA

(r 5) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), rears on his left: the foundations of Elam will be firm.

r 66

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ana IGI-šu₂ ki-di-ir SUḪUŠ kurSU.BIR₄ki GI.NA

(r 6) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), rears forwards: the foundations of Subartu will be permanent.

r 77

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ana EGIR-šu₂ ki-di-ir SUḪUŠ kurMAR.TU GI.NA

(r 7) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), rears backwards: the foundations of Amurru will be permanent.

r 88

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ i-saq-qu₂ dEN.LIL₂ ana KUR BI ŠA₃.ḪUL SUM-ši

(r 8) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his eyes narrow: Ellil will give sorrow to that land.

r 99

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ SAG-MEŠ-šu₂ ša-qa-a DINGIR-MEŠ SAG KUR i-na-aš₂-šu-u₂

(r 9) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), his head is held high: the gods will take care of the land.

r 1010

* KI.MIN<(dAMAR.UTU)> ina E₂.SAG.IL₂ ina SAG MU ina E₃-šu₂ ta-ri-iṣ-ma GUB KUR BI i-kan LUGAL KUR BI kiš-šu₂-tu₂ TIqe₂

(r 10) (If) ditto (Marduk), when going out (of Esaggil at the beginning of the year), is proper then stands: that land will become secured ; the king of that land will assume power.

r 1111

35-AM₃ MU-BI.IM ta-mar-ti dAMAR.UTU

(r 11) 35 lines: appearance of Marduk.

r 1212

* gišMA₂.TUŠ.A gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ana ID₂ ina ŠUBe is-kil KUR BI ip-pa-ra-ar₂

(r 12) (If) the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river, gets stuck: (the people of) that land will be dispersed.

r 1313

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ina ID₂ is-ḫu-up bal-ṭu₄ GARan

(r 13) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) overturns: dignity will be established.

r 1414

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ina MURU₂-ša₂ iš-še-bi-ir DINGIR-MEŠ ana KUR BI ḪULtu₂ i-šar-ra-ku

(r 14) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is broken in its middle: the gods will bestow evil on that land.

r 1515

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ina IGI-MIN-ša₂ iš-še-bi-ir DINGIR-MEŠ ina SU KUR BAD-MEŠ : : SUḪUŠ!(LA) KUR ul!(UB) GI.NA

(r 15) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is broken on its prow: the gods will withdraw from the heart of the land (or): : the foundations of the land will not be firm.

r 1616

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ina ZA₃-ša₂ iš-še-bi-ir DINGIR-MEŠ KUR BI i-sak₆-ki-pu

(r 16) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is broken on its right: the gods will overthrow that land.

r 1717

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ina GUB₃-ša₂ iš-še-bi-ir DINGIR-MEŠ KUR BI ir-ra-ru

(r 17) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is broken on its left: the gods will curse that land.

r 1818

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU ina EGIR-šu₂ iš-še-bi-ir DINGIR-MEŠ KUR BI ana ḪUL!ti UŠ-MEŠ

(r 18) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is broken on its rear: the gods will evilly lead that land.

r 1919

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU is-sa₃-pi-iḫ DINGIR-MEŠ EN ul-<la> KUR BIR-MEŠ

(r 19) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is (all) broken up: the gods will scatter the (people of the) land forever.

r 2020

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU iṭ-bu KUR BI NIG₂.GIG IGI

(r 20) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) sinks: (the people of) that land will experience trouble.

r 2121

* KI.MIN<(gišMA₂.TUŠ.A)> gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU šu-šu-rat dEN.LIL₂ ana KUR ana SIG₅ti u₂-šar

(r 21) (If) ditto (the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat, when launching in the river,) is in good condition: Ellil will bow down towards the land with kindness.

r 2222

10 MU-BI.IM ta-mar-ti gišMA₂.TUŠ.A gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU

(r 22) 10 lines: appearance of the matušû-boat, the boat of Marduk.

(catchline)
r 2323

* ANŠE.KUR.RA ša gišGIGIR DINGIR is-kil UMUŠ KUR MANni

(r 23) (If) the horse of the god's chariot rears up: the mind of the land will change.

Top
(colophon)
t.e. 11

IM mBAša₂-a bu₁₂-kur₂ mdINANA—MU—KAM₂ ŠA₃.BAL.BAL mE₂.KUR—za-kir lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ

(t.e. 1) Tablet of Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš, descendant of Ekur-zakir, incantation priest.

t.e. 22

qat₃ md60—ŠEŠ—MU DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄—d60

(t.e. 2) Hand of Anu-ah-iddin, son of Nidintu-Anu.

Created by Marie-Françoise Besnier for the AHRC-funded GKAB Project, 2009 and released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/cams/gkab/P348640
